component.name: poll
component.description: Synchronously polls one message from a queue. Returns null on timeout. Inside beginTransaction settlement is deferred to commit/rollback (at-least-once); outside a transaction the message is acked on receipt (at-most-once).

component.name: browse
component.description: Browses messages on a queue without consuming them. Useful for diagnostics and DLQ inspection.

component.name: requestCachedMessages
component.description: Requests historical messages from a PubSub+ Cache Instance for a topic. Requires a cache instance to be deployed and configured for the requested topic pattern.
